title: Finn's Wiggly Tooth Adventure
synopsis: When Finn discovers his first loose tooth, he and his best friend Bella go on a hilarious adventure trying different silly ways to make it fall out, learning that patience and friendship make everything more fun.

pages.text: Finn was eating his apple at lunch when something felt funny. He wiggled his front tooth with his tongue. It moved! "WHOA!" Finn shouted so loud that everyone in the cafeteria turned to look. His eyes grew as big as dinner plates.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes sits at a bright yellow cafeteria table, mouth wide open in shock, eyes comically huge, holding a red apple. His body is stretched back dramatically in surprise, with other cartoon children in the background turning to stare.
illustration.alt: Finn dramatically reacting to discovering his loose tooth while eating lunch

pages.text: "My tooth is wiggling!" Finn announced, poking at it with his finger. The tooth wobbled back and forth like a tiny see-saw. Finn's best friend Bella bounced over, her pigtails flying. "Really? Let me see!" she said, squinting at Finn's mouth like a detective with a magnifying glass.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes pointing dramatically at his mouth while Bella leans in super close, squinting comically with one eye shut. Both children are drawn with exaggerated rubbery poses in candy bright colors.
illustration.alt: Finn showing his loose tooth to his friend Bella who is examining it closely

pages.text: "It's definitely loose!" Bella declared. "My big sister says when your tooth falls out, the Tooth Fairy comes!" Finn's tooth wiggled more when he smiled. "But when will it fall out?" he wondered. "I can't wait that long!" His whole body bounced with excitement.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes bouncing up and down like a rubber ball, arms stretched high above his head. Bella gestures wildly with her hands. Both kids are drawn in bouncy, elastic cartoon style with bright, energetic colors.
illustration.alt: Finn bouncing excitedly while talking to Bella about the Tooth Fairy

pages.text: "I have an idea!" Bella said, snapping her fingers. "We need string and a doorknob!" They found yarn in the art room. Bella tied one end to Finn's tooth and the other to the classroom door. "This will work for sure!" she said confidently.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes standing nervously next to a bright red door with yellow yarn stretching from his mouth to the doorknob. Bella stands nearby with her hands on her hips, looking very proud. The scene is drawn in exaggerated cartoon style with squash-and-stretch proportions.
illustration.alt: Finn connected to a door by yarn tied to his loose tooth

pages.text: "Ready?" Bella asked. Finn nodded, but his eyes were squeezed shut tight. Bella opened the door slowly. The yarn stretched and stretched... and then SNAP! The yarn broke, and Finn tumbled backward like a bowling pin. The tooth was still there, wiggling more than ever!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes falling backward in a comical tumble with arms and legs flailing like rubber noodles. Broken yellow yarn pieces float in the air. His expression shows surprise with his mouth in a perfect 'O' shape. Bella watches with hands covering her mouth.
illustration.alt: Finn tumbling backward after the yarn breaks during the tooth-pulling attempt

pages.text: "Hmm," said Bella, tapping her chin. "Maybe we need a different plan." Finn wiggled his tooth again. It was definitely looser now! "What if we try jumping?" Finn suggested. "Gravity might help!" They both giggled at the silly word 'gravity.'

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes and Bella both in thinking poses - Bella with her finger on her chin, Finn with his head tilted sideways. Both are drawn with exaggerated thinking expressions and bright, bouncy cartoon styling with oversized heads and expressive eyes.
illustration.alt: Finn and Bella thinking of new ways to remove the loose tooth

pages.text: Out on the playground, Finn and Bella found the highest slide. "If I slide down really fast and jump off, maybe the tooth will fly out!" Finn climbed up the ladder, his tooth wiggling with each step. At the top, he looked down nervously.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes at the top of a bright purple playground slide, looking down with wide, nervous eyes. His body is stretched tall and wobbly like rubber. Bella stands at the bottom, arms outstretched encouragingly. The playground equipment is drawn in vibrant candy colors.
illustration.alt: Finn nervously preparing to go down the slide to try to lose his tooth

pages.text: "WHEEEEE!" Finn zoomed down the slide like a rocket. His hair flew straight back, and his cheeks puffed out from the wind. He launched off the end and landed in the soft sand with a THUMP! He checked his tooth immediately. Still there, but wiggling like crazy!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes flying through the air off the slide with his hair streaming behind him and cheeks comically puffed out. His body is stretched and squashed from the motion. Sand particles explode around where he's about to land in a cloud of tan and yellow.
illustration.alt: Finn flying off the slide with puffed cheeks and hair streaming behind him

pages.text: "Try the monkey bars!" Bella suggested. Finn swung from bar to bar, his whole body bouncing and jiggling. "Maybe all this shaking will work!" he called out. But when he dropped down, the stubborn tooth was still hanging on tight. Finn couldn't help but laugh at how silly he looked.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes hanging from bright green monkey bars with his entire body stretched and wobbling like jello. His legs dangle and bounce comically. Bella claps and cheers below him. Everything is drawn in bouncy, elastic cartoon style with vibrant playground colors.
illustration.alt: Finn swinging on monkey bars with his body bouncing and stretching

pages.text: After all their silly adventures, Finn and Bella sat under their favorite tree to rest. "I guess my tooth will come out when it's ready," Finn said, still wiggling it gently. "At least we had fun trying!" Bella agreed, and they both started giggling about their crazy day.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes and Bella sitting under a large green tree with purple flowers. Both are drawn in relaxed, happy poses with big smiles. Finn is gently touching his tooth. The scene uses soft, warm candy-bright colors with dappled sunlight.
illustration.alt: Finn and Bella resting under a tree, looking content after their adventures

pages.text: Just as Finn was telling Bella about how funny he looked on the monkey bars, he laughed so hard that... POP! His tooth popped right out into his hand! "IT WORKED!" he shouted. "What worked?" Bella asked. "Having fun with my best friend!" Finn grinned his new gap-toothed smile.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes holding up his tiny white tooth triumphantly with a huge gap-toothed grin. His body is stretched upward in celebration with arms raised high. Bella jumps up excitedly beside him. Both are drawn with maximum joy and energy in bright, celebratory colors.
illustration.alt: Finn celebrating with his lost tooth in his hand, showing his gap-toothed smile

pages.text: That night, Finn carefully placed his tooth under his pillow. "Thanks for helping me today, Bella," he said as she headed home. "Even though none of our crazy plans worked!" They both laughed. Sometimes the best things happen when you're just having fun with friends. And sometimes, teeth know exactly when they're ready to go!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving goodbye to Bella from his front door, both with huge happy smiles. The evening sky is painted in soft purple and pink colors. Finn's gap-toothed grin is prominently displayed, and both children radiate friendship and joy in the warm cartoon style.
illustration.alt: Finn waving goodbye to Bella from his doorway, both children smiling happily

metadata.illustrationStyle: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel

questions.question: Where was Finn when he first discovered his loose tooth?
questions.explanation: Finn was eating his apple at lunch in the cafeteria when he felt his tooth wiggle for the first time.

questions.question: What did Bella and Finn try first to pull out the tooth?
questions.explanation: Bella's first idea was to tie yarn to Finn's tooth and the classroom doorknob, but the yarn broke.

questions.question: How did Finn's tooth finally come out?
choices: when he jumped off the slide
when he pulled it with his fingers
questions.explanation: Finn's tooth popped out when he was laughing hard while telling Bella about their funny day.

questions.question: Who is Finn's best friend in the story?
questions.explanation: Bella is Finn's best friend who helps him try to pull out his loose tooth throughout the story.

questions.question: What did Finn learn by the end of the story?
choices: that having fun with friends is the best part
that he should pull his teeth out himself
that the Tooth Fairy isn't real
questions.explanation: Finn learned that having fun with his best friend was what made the day special, and good things happen when you're patient.
